description_long: This is a modern, high-back swivel chair with a matching ottoman, both upholstered in a rich tan leather. The chair features a plush, tufted seat and backrest with deep cushioning, providing ergonomic support and comfort. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, with a prominent headrest integrated into the design. The armrests are smoothly curved and padded, seamlessly blending into the chair's overall silhouette. Both the chair and ottoman rest on sturdy, black, four-pronged metal bases that allow for stability and smooth swiveling. The overall aesthetic is luxurious and contemporary, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish office lounges.
description: A luxurious tan leather swivel chair with a matching ottoman, featuring plush tufted cushioning and black metal bases. The chair has a high back with an integrated headrest and curved padded armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full seat, tufted backrest, headrest, and matching ottoman, highlighting the chair's inviting, plush appearance.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the chair's reclined profile, thick cushioning, and the depth of the seat and ottoman, as well as the black metal base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned leather back and the full width of the headrest, with the base visible below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the chair's ergonomic contour, armrest shape, and the ottoman's matching design.
attribute_central_support_column: A single, sturdy, black metal column extending from the center of the seat to a four-pronged base; fixed height, non-telescoping.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured backrest with integrated headrest, deep tufting, and thick tan leather upholstery; no cutouts, smooth rear surface.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests upholstered in tan leather, seamlessly integrated into the chair's side structure.
